title: Cooks, Short Order
description: Prepare and cook to order a variety of foods that require only a short preparation time. May take orders from customers and serve patrons at counters or tables.

tasks.text: Clean food preparation equipment, work areas, and counters or tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Restock kitchen supplies, rotate food, and stamp the time and date on food in coolers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete orders from steam tables, placing food on plates and serving customers at tables or counters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan work on orders so that items served together are finished at the same time.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Grill, cook, and fry foods such as french fries, eggs, and pancakes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform food preparation tasks, such as making sandwiches, carving meats, making soups or salads, baking breads or desserts, and brewing coffee or tea.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform general cleaning activities in kitchen and dining areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take orders from customers and cook foods requiring short preparation times, according to customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grill and garnish hamburgers or other meats, such as steaks and chops.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order supplies and stock them on shelves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Accept payments, and make change or write charge slips as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
